titles.title: Why God (... do people have to die...)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v3 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Why God do people have to die? A daughter or a son, Sudden and so young Long before their time?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Why God do people fall apart? A promise and a ring becomes a broken thing A road that got too hard?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I don't understand, but I understand

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Why God? I need You It's why God I run to Your arms, Over and over again It's why God I cling to Your love And hold on for dear life And I find You are right by my side

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Why God do we feel so alone? Every single day fighting through the pain Hoping there is hope?

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Give me a faith stronger than I have, i need to know when it hurts this bad, That You hold my heart when it breaks And I'm not alone in this place

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: That's why God I need You Why God? I run to Your arms Over and over again It's why God I cling to Your love And hold on for dear life And I find You are right by my side

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Always right by my side Even here in the why God
